features.name: Signals ELN App Browser
features.description: Provides a Datagrok application and tree-browser sidebar panel for navigating and accessing data from the Revvity Signals electronic lab notebook. Users can browse ELN entries without leaving the Datagrok platform.
features.evidence_summary: Both functions implement the same ELN integration — one registers the top-level app view (browsePath: Chem), the other the tree-browser sidebar panel — and the package readme documents the same capability.
